creator: raimeetravel
caption:
Finallyyy!! This helps me manage all my travel card benefits so I don’t forget about them. There are so many you might not even know you have on each card (& and I honestly feel like the companies don’t WANT you to know about them all!)

This is just a Google Sheet you can copy and make your own based on the cards you have! It was created by @thriftytraveler — my fave cheap flight email newsletter! 

If you want your own just ✍️ comment TOOL and I’ll send you the link to make your copy!!

#travelcards #pointsandmiles #travelrewards

transcription.text: If you have more than one travel rewards credit card, this is going to change your life because it changed mine. I always forget about what benefits my cards have, like what is built into the hefty annual fee. I just started using this tool, it's from Thrifty Traveler, it helps you track and note all of the benefits that each one of your cards has. Like last year, I did not use a $300 hotel credit I could have used that I had already on one of my cards. I just forgot about it, but now I'm going to be tracking everything with this tool. Also, it's free. Comment tool and I'll send it to you. And if you don't have a Thrifty Traveler newsletter subscription already, you need to get it. That's how I find all of my cheap flights, all of the best points and miles deals. You can use my code. Safe travels. I know this is going to be so helpful. I'm super excited to start using it this year. Look at all of these benefits that I'm now going to take advantage of because I won't forget about them. Okay, bye.
